title: Revisiting Change VQA in Remote Sensing with Structured and Native Multimodal Qwen Models
summary: Change visual question answering (Change VQA) addresses the problem of answering natural-language questions about semantic changes between bi-temporal remote sensing (RS) images. Although vision-language models (VLMs) have recently been...
